Header.attentionDotAria: You have My Page updates to review

Footer.brandPitch:
Follow routes built by locals.
Experience Seoul the easy way.
Footer.disclaimer: Companion support only. Not medical, legal, or emergency services. No claim of 24/7 protection or guaranteed safety. By using 하루 you acknowledge these limits.
Footer.disclaimerShort: This service is designed for practical local support and useful information. It does not replace medical, legal, or emergency services, and does not guarantee 24/7 protection.

Brand.description: 하루 connects international K-culture fans with verified Seoul 하루이—language-fit matching, curated 하루웨이, and traveler reviews you can actually use.

Home.metaDescription: Your day in Seoul—verified 하루이, mood-first 하루웨이, and reviews written for real days.
Home.heroTitle: The Seoul you streamed. The streets you’ll walk.
Home.heroLead: Match with verified local guardians who speak your language and your vibe—then plan from real routes and reviews, not brochure noise.
Home.credibilityTitle: Why travelers take the leap with us
Home.credibilityLead: Verification, language fit, reviews, and reply cadence in one view—so your first message lands with context, not cold opens.
Home.credibilityReviewsMore: More traveler voices · How we feature them
Home.heroCarouselSlide2: My Love from the Star · N Seoul Tower
Home.heroCarouselSlide4: The King and the Clown · Gyeongbokgung
Home.processClarity: We read what you send, then work toward a guardian match. Most people hear back within a day or two.
Home.regionsSectionTitle: First — where do you want to start?
Home.regionsSectionLead: 하루 launches in Gwanghwamun and Gangnam first. Sharper experiences in verified launch areas.
Home.themesSectionTitle: Choose the mood of your trip
Home.themesSectionLead: You don’t need a show title — start from the vibe you want, and we’ll match guardians and posts.
Home.postsSectionLead: A few field-tested threads from Seoul—read the spine of a day before you say hello.
Home.trust42Lead: Verification, language fit, reviews, and reply cadence—laid out so you can compare at a glance.
Home.trust42CardVerifiedDesc: Only 하루이 who pass ops review enter the matching pool.
Home.trust42CardLanguageDesc: Languages are explicit so expectations match upfront.
Home.trust42CardReviewsDesc: Real sessions and inquiries build reputation over time.
Home.trust42CardFastDesc: Guardians aim for reply windows that fit busy trips.
Home.aboutSectionLead: Built for international fans who fell in love with Korea through screens first.
Home.aboutSectionBody: We curate real Seoul moods and help you choose a 하루이 by language and travel style. Launch is Gwanghwamun and Gangnam only — not nationwide.
Home.comingSectionLead: Busan and Jeju need more content and guardians before they go live. We’re not positioning as nationwide at launch.
Home.comingSectionNote: Region tiles marked “Opening later” can’t be selected or booked.
Home.signupSectionLead: Create an account to keep requests, saves, and alerts in one place. (Early release: some flows still roll out.)
Home.discoverSectionTitle: Signals from the ground, more useful than a brochure
Home.discoverSectionLead: Start with local posts and Guardian recommendations, then request human support only when you need it.
Home.featuredGuardiansSectionLead: Based on your area and travel mood, we surface 하루이 who match right now.
Home.decisionSummaryDefault: Choose area & mood on the home cards to see your criteria here.
Home.servicesSectionLead: Arrival, K-routes, first day — clear scope.
Home.howItWorksLead: Insights, reputation, and support stay connected.
Home.scopeNoteDetail: Not medical, legal, or emergency services. See what’s included before you send a request.
Home.layersLead: Intel from reviewed contributions; matching checked on its own. Early on, handoffs may go through channels you already use. We favor clear boundaries over hype.
Home.layer1Body: City tips and what you need right after landing — reviewed, not noisy.
Home.layer2Body: Trust comes from contributions and reviews — not volume alone.
Home.layer3Body: Reviewed matching first. Early handoffs use external channels you already use.
Home.sessionsLead: Arrival, K-routes, and first-day help — clear scope, practical support.
Home.heroImageTitle: A Seoul day that feels like a scene
Home.dualCtaTravelerLead: Pick someone whose language, reviews, and style feel right—then send one clear request.
Home.dualCtaTravelerImageAlt: Professional male portrait suggesting a trusted local guide
Home.dualCtaGuardianLead: Turn how you read the city into 하루웨이, trust, and meaningful matches—without losing your voice.
Home.dualCtaGuardianImageAlt: Professional woman portrait conveying warmth and trust
Home.ctaLead: Pick a guardian, send a request—we review the details and scope, then line up the handoff.

HomeQuickStart.title: Pick a corner of Seoul and a mood—two taps
HomeQuickStart.lead: We launch in Gwanghwamun & Gangnam first. Your combo updates matching guardians and posts instantly.
HomeQuickStart.step1Title: 1. Choose the area that sets the scene
HomeQuickStart.step2Title: 2. Choose the mood of your trip
HomeQuickStart.summaryEmpty: Select an area and/or a mood
HomeQuickStart.ctaGuardiansDisabled: Pick a region or mood first
HomeQuickStart.regionDesc_gwanghwamun: Quiet alleys and drama-like moods — classic Seoul scenes.
HomeQuickStart.regionDesc_gangnam: City energy, night views, and a trend-forward rhythm.
HomeQuickStart.regionDesc_busan: Beach and markets — we’re getting the next chapter ready.
HomeQuickStart.moodDesc_k_drama_romance: A sentimental walk that feels like a drama still.
HomeQuickStart.moodDesc_seoul_night: See Seoul after dark with a sharper, curated flow.
HomeQuickStart.moodDesc_k_pop_day: Album shops, pop-ups, and fan-favorite stops in one day.
HomeQuickStart.moodDesc_movie_location: Walk the streets you remember from the screen.
HomeQuickStart.moodDesc_safe_solo: Comfortable pacing and routes when you’re on your own.
HomeQuickStart.moodDesc_photo_route: Moments and angles picked for great photos.

Services.metaDescription: Arrival, K-Route, and First 24 Hours companion support in Seoul.
Services.title: Companion services
Services.intro: Fixed-scope support sessions. Pricing shown is indicative for MVP planning — final quotes may vary by distance and timing.

arrival.title: Arrival Companion
arrival.shortDescription: From airport or station to your stay, make your first move easier.
bullets: Transit card, SIM, and first-trip setup
Check-in help and light local settling support

k_route.title: K-Route Companion
k_route.shortDescription: Get to the places you care about, with less friction along the way.
bullets: Help with ordering, navigation, and on-site communication

first_24h.title: First 24 Hours
first_24h.shortDescription: For the first day in Korea, when everything feels most unfamiliar.
bullets: Help with apps, transit, food, and getting oriented
Practical support within a clearly defined scope

Explore.metaDescription: Region-based local intelligence — moderated, practical, Guardian-grounded.
Explore.heroTitle: Real local intelligence — before you book
Explore.heroDescription: Explore is curated for decisions: hot places, food queues, K-content execution, shopping mechanics, and practical arrival tips. Most insights come from Guardians with visible tiers and contribution history — not generic blog posts or open forums.
Explore.heroNote: We gather practical information for both Korean and international readers. The aim is Guardian-reviewed clarity — not machine translation.
Explore.regionSectionLead: Phase 1 metros first — structure ready for Phase 2 destinations.
Explore.featuredLead: Trusted locals and seed partners — highlighted for quality, not pay-to-play ads.
Explore.ctaLead: Browse intel first — then book scoped support or start contributing as a Guardian.
Explore.regionHubTagsLead: Filter posts below — same categories as the national Explore view.
Explore.moderationPreviewLead: Shown for ops alignment — travelers normally see approved posts only.
Explore.regionGuardiansLead: Active and verified tiers reflect contribution and separate verification — not hype.

Book.metaDescription: Request trusted local support — reviewed before matching.
Book.title: Request trusted local support
Book.intro: This is a calm, structured intake — not a one-click tour checkout. Share accurate context so we can match you thoughtfully. External chat is only introduced after our team approves scope and a Guardian fit.

TrustScope.title: Service scope and limits
TrustScope.lead: 하루 focuses on practical local support and useful information. It is not a guided tour, medical or legal assistance, or an emergency-response service. By being clear about scope, we make the experience easier to trust.
included: City-based local insights and reviewed posts
Guardian reputation built through contributions and reviews
On-the-ground support for arrival, K-routes, and first 24 hours
External chat handoff after matching (Telegram, KakaoTalk, WhatsApp, etc.)
excluded: Promotional content or an unmoderated forum
Automatic matching rights based on post count alone
Support that replaces medical, legal, or emergency services
Built-in real-time chat during the MVP phase

BookingSuccess.title: Request submitted
BookingSuccess.body: Thank you. Our team will review your context and availability. You are not connected to a Guardian or external chat yet — we will email you at {email} with next steps when matching is ready.
BookingSuccess.bodyNoEmail: Thank you. Our team will review your context and availability. You are not connected to a Guardian or external chat yet — we will contact you with next steps when matching is ready.
BookingSuccess.mvpNote: (MVP: not saved to database — configure Supabase for persistence.)
BookingSuccess.summaryUnavailableBody: Open this page from the same browser session right after submitting, or keep your reference ID for support.
BookingSuccess.summaryUnavailableHint: If you refreshed or opened in another device, details are not stored client-side.

Login.title: Log in
Login.description: Sign in with Google to save favorites, request matches, and use My page. Guardian onboarding starts from My page after you sign in.

Login.cardIntro: Safety and companion intel for Korea—curated in one place.
Login.devMockGuardianHint: Tap a row to sign in as that seed guardian and open My page with the Guardian workspace active. Remove before production.

ExploreJourney.metaDescription: Match guardians and posts to your mood, dates, and languages.
ExploreJourney.heroTitle: Shape your Seoul trip from taste first
ExploreJourney.heroBody: Choose area, theme, timing, and mood — we bundle guardians and posts worth a look. Recommendations don’t replace your decisions, and you can move step by step without pressure.
ExploreJourney.stepTheme: What mood of trip do you want?
ExploreJourney.decisionInterpretBoth: {area}, 「{theme}」mood, {party}, {days} trip, {pace} pace — that’s the mix we used.
ExploreJourney.decisionInterpretArea: {area} routes, {party}, {days}, {pace} — that’s how we narrowed it.
ExploreJourney.decisionInterpretFallback: {party}, {days}, {pace} — we used that baseline to build the list.
ExploreJourney.dashTrustMetaNote: Verification, languages, and reviews are also on their profile.
ExploreJourney.dashCompareSectionLead: Skim side by side with #1 to narrow your choice.
ExploreJourney.fitLineKpop: Explains K-pop spots in a natural, easy way
ExploreJourney.fitLineWalking: Light, mostly on foot — easy to move
ExploreJourney.resultsHeadlineGeneric: Here’s what matches your current choices
ExploreJourney.resultsSubLead: Based on your area and theme, we’re showing guardians whose routes and vibe fit best first.
ExploreJourney.dashDecisionHelperShort: Pick one person, then Request. Use View profile for detail and reviews.
ExploreJourney.criteriaLineBoth: We weighted {area} walking lines, the {theme} mood, and a {pace} companion pace.
ExploreJourney.criteriaLineArea: We weighted {area} walking lines and a {pace} companion pace.
ExploreJourney.criteriaLineTheme: We weighted the {theme} mood and a {pace} companion pace.
ExploreJourney.criteriaLineFallback: We applied your {pace} companion pace plus trip and language filters.
ExploreJourney.postsSecondaryLead: Skim routes and vibes before you choose a guardian.
ExploreJourney.dashFinalLead: Compare rank and the one-line reasons, then pick the guardian you want.
ExploreJourney.dashDecisionHelper: Use Request as the main action; open View profile in a sheet for more context. Posts and routes use preview drawers below.
ExploreJourney.dashTopPickHint: Closest fit to what you chose
ExploreJourney.comingSoonRegion: This area opens soon — meet Gwanghwamun & Gangnam guardians first.
ExploreJourney.tripSetupSubtitle: Dates, group size, and language help us tune recommendations — light taps, not a long form.
ExploreJourney.tripWhenHint: Pick a quick preset or add a specific date below.
ExploreJourney.langMoreHint: Choose how you’d like to communicate with guardians. “Any” widens the pool.
ExploreJourney.langMoreFootnote: More languages will roll out as we expand.
ExploreJourney.tasteBuilderSubtitle: Shows, people, scene moods, and guardian style — the more you mix, the closer to your Seoul.
ExploreJourney.dashSubtitle: Guardians, routes, and posts picked from what you chose so far.
ExploreJourney.reasonWhen_two_weeks: Practical pacing for within two weeks.
ExploreJourney.reasonDatePicked: Your date informs crowd & timing hints.
ExploreJourney.reasonParty: Group size {label} tuned the guidance tone.
ExploreJourney.reasonLangAny: Language left open to widen matches.
ExploreJourney.reasonWorks: Your show picks influenced content matching.
ExploreJourney.reasonArtists: Artist taste nudged the recommendation tone.
ExploreJourney.reasonScenes: Scene mood cards affected route & post ordering.
ExploreJourney.reasonStyles: Guardian style cards filtered companion fit.
ExploreJourney.moodStyle_no_match_test_hint: Intentional unmatched option for empty-result UX testing

GuardiansDiscover.metaDescription: Compare 하루이 by region, language, and travel style.
GuardiansDiscover.heroBody:
They build and share Seoul days, one route at a time.
Browse by region, language, and style to find yours.
GuardiansDiscover.empty: No 하루이 found for these filters
GuardiansDiscover.emptyBody: Try widening your filters or exploring a different region or theme.
GuardiansDiscover.launchOnlyNote: Showing 하루이 from launch areas (Gwanghwamun · Gangnam) by default.

GuardianDetail.areaSoon: This guardian’s home area is not live yet — explore others.
GuardianDetail.introDecisionLead: The headline above is the quick read; below is the fuller story of how they guide.
GuardianDetail.postsDecisionLead: Open the sheet for the full list — here are quick insight previews.
GuardianDetail.introGalleryLead: Short cuts to set expectations for routes and style — not a full gallery.
GuardianDetail.requestTitle: If you want to go with this guardian
GuardianDetail.requestLead: We review your note and help with handoff. No need to rush.
GuardianDetail.requestGuide: Share timing, party size, mood, and must-see areas—short notes improve reply quality.
GuardianDetail.heroCtaHint: Opens a request panel on this page. Share type and timing—we’ll review and help with handoff.
GuardianDetail.expertiseLead: How they usually guide, per theme.
GuardianDetail.trustLead: Grounded in platform checks and recent activity.
GuardianDetail.postsLead: Skim posts to sense style and routing before you book.
GuardianDetail.insightsViewAllPosts: View all posts by this guardian
GuardianDetail.reviewSample: Reviews accumulate after real sessions — samples below.
GuardianDetail.reviewsLead: Written by travelers with a completed match on record. Ratings are indicative; experiences vary.
GuardianDetail.noPosts: Signature posts are being linked — check expertise and reviews for now.

GuardianRequest.sheetIntroLead: Submit from this panel—our team reviews and helps connect you. You stay on this page; no extra navigation required.
GuardianRequest.fieldRequestKindHelp: Pick half-day, full day, full trip planning, or a light inquiry. Dates can be refined later.
GuardianRequest.asideBulletHalfFull: Half-day or full-day companion-style support requests.
GuardianRequest.asideBulletRegion: You can center the request on a region (e.g. capital area, Busan, Jeju).
GuardianRequest.asideBulletTheme: Ask for something close to this post’s mood, route, or theme.
GuardianRequest.asideBulletFlexible: Dates don’t need to be final—you can leave an inquiry and refine later.
GuardianRequest.helperDate: Leave blank if flexible—we’ll treat it as “to be coordinated.”
GuardianRequest.moodPlaceholder: e.g. quiet cafés, photo-friendly, first visit—keep it calm
GuardianRequest.helperDetails: We can refine details after the first reply.
GuardianRequest.agreeScope: I understand this is not medical/legal/emergency help and matching is not instant.
GuardianRequest.agreeReview: I understand requests are reviewed and contact may wait until approval.
GuardianRequest.agreeNoChat: I understand external chat (Kakao/Telegram/etc.) may only start after guidance/approval.
GuardianRequest.footerNote: You’ll go to a confirmation screen next. Our team reviews and follows up.
GuardianRequest.errorContact: Please enter your name and email.
GuardianRequest.errorAgreements: Please agree to all items above.
GuardianRequest.errorSubmit: Could not send. Please try again.

AboutPage.metaDescription: What is 하루? — Discover 하루웨이, 하루이, how to start, and pricing in one place.
AboutPage.legalTermsBody: Full terms will be published before public launch. Until then, see the About page for how we operate.
AboutPage.legalPrivacyBody: A full privacy policy will be published before public launch. Sign-in uses Supabase Auth; collection and use will be described here.
AboutPage.travelerVoicesTitle: About the quotes you see on Home
AboutPage.travelerVoicesLead: They’re curated examples. Real matching depends on schedule, area, and guardian availability. Ratings and one-liners are signals, not guarantees.

hero.title: Seoul shouldn’t feel like homework
hero.subtitle: You already love the city on screen—we help you meet it with verified locals, mood-first discovery, and reviews that read like real trips.

bridgeOne.title: The gap isn’t lack of tips—it’s lack of a thread
bridgeOne.lead: 하루 is the layer where language, mood, and proof line up: profiles you can read, posts you can walk, and boundaries we state upfront.

bridgeTwo.title: Three beats: mood, match, message
bridgeTwo.lead: No tour-package theatrics—just a calmer path from “I love this vibe” to “I know who I’m talking to.”

problem.title: The first day in Seoul can feel loud in your head
problem.lead: Infinite content, zero guarantee it fits your pace, language, or taste today. Solo doesn’t mean you want to white-knuckle every decision.
problem.oneBody: The more magnetic the city, the more routes, vibes, and choices can hit you at once.
problem.twoTitle: Too much signal, not enough thread
problem.twoBody: Reviews and shorts are endless; a single coherent line through your taste, pace, and language is harder to find.
problem.threeTitle: The quiet tension of solo travel
problem.threeBody: We cannot replace emergency services — but practical reassurance and predictable connection change how a day feels.

how.title: We keep the journey human-sized
how.lead: Pick the mood, see who fits, reach out when you’re ready—expectations first, handoffs reviewed.
how.oneBody: Start from region, atmosphere, and interests to gather routes and field insights.
how.twoBody: Read profiles, posts, and reviews together — pick someone whose language and style feel right.
how.threeBody: Connections follow review-first flows so expectations stay grounded, not inflated.

traveler.title: You bring the fandom—we bring the footing
traveler.lead: Verified guardians, explicit languages, and writing meant for walking—not for flexing bucket lists.
traveler.oneBody: Verified guardians, clear profiles, and reviews you can read before you reach out.
traveler.twoBody: Posts and routes are written as actionable hints for planning your day.
traveler.threeBody: Keep the K-culture feeling you already love — streets, cafés, and neighborhoods at walking speed.

guardian.title: Your eye for the city is the product
guardian.lead: Share launch-area scenes only locals frame well—build trust with posts, care, and clear ops standards.
guardian.oneBody: Launch areas like Gwanghwamun and Gangnam — share the scenes only a local would frame.
guardian.twoBody: Posts, responses, and match requests are designed to read as proof, not noise.
guardian.threeBody: Points and tiers follow ops policy — built for sustainable contribution, not empty hype.

trust.title: We lead with what you can check—not what we hope you’ll forget
trust.lead: Scope, reviews, verification, and language fit are visible before you ever hit send.
trust.oneBody: We are not medical, legal, or emergency services; we do not promise round-the-clock protection.
trust.twoBody: Traveler feedback and curated writing are real signals for understanding a guardian.
trust.threeBody: Guardian status reflects ops standards so you can judge before you connect.

story.title: A Seoul day when a local thread appears
story.lead: A light narrative of how traveler and guardian rhythms can meet.
story.morningTitle: A morning that felt tighter alone
story.morningBody: You bounced between maps and clips — the first move of the day still looked fuzzy.
story.routeTitle: A route that landed from a local guardian
story.routeBody: Posts and profiles clicked; language and mood matched, and the day gained a clear spine.
story.eveningTitle: An evening where the city sits lighter
story.eveningBody: Optional requests when you want another step — or keep walking solo, now with a calmer head.

final.title: Where does your Seoul start tomorrow?
final.lead: Travelers: sketch the mood, meet a guardian, send one honest request. Locals: tell the city your way—apply when you’re ready.

landing.legalIntro: Full legal text ships before public launch. Expand the sections below for the current summary.

TravelerHub.guardianDashMatchPipelineLead: New, in progress, and completed (sample data)

GuardianProfileEdit.metaDescription: Manage your public profile and images.
GuardianProfileEdit.pageLead: Continue onboarding and documents in the wizard. Set public-facing images below.
GuardianProfileEdit.marketingCopyLead: One-line intro, long bio, strengths, trust reasons, and featured insights will be editable here via API (`public_marketing_overlay`) in a later iteration.
GuardianProfileEdit.noRow: No guardian profile yet. Start an application first.

GuardianProfileImages.sectionLead: Use three roles—avatar, list card, and detail hero—so each surface shows the right crop.
GuardianProfileImages.sectionCropExplain: Every slot fills its frame with object-cover; mismatched aspect ratios crop at the edges. Previews below use the same rules as the live site.
GuardianProfileImages.hintStorage: Direct file upload will arrive with Storage. For now, paste a public image URL.
GuardianProfileImages.previewFootnoteCommon: The dashed box is a composition hint, not a legal safe zone.
GuardianProfileImages.avatarHelp: Small circular avatars in headers and My Page. Prefer a square-ish face-centered crop (512×512px+). On mobile we bias toward the top—leave a little headroom so chins/faces are less likely to clip.
GuardianProfileImages.listHelp: Left media column on guardian list cards—a narrow vertical strip on phones. Very tall or very wide originals crop heavily. Prefer portrait-leaning 3:4–4:5 with the subject mid-to-upper frame.
GuardianProfileImages.listPreviewCaption: Preview: similar to the list-card left column (~7.25×9.5rem).
GuardianProfileImages.detailHelp: Wide hero on the public guardian page—about 21:10 on mobile and flatter on large screens. Tall portraits lose a lot on the sides. Prefer a wide landscape (≈21:9–3:1), subject centered.
GuardianProfileImages.detailPreviewCaption: Preview: wide 21:9 frame like the detail hero.
GuardianProfileImages.introGalleryHelp: Horizontal gallery under “About this guardian” on the detail page. Each tile is ~4:3; extreme ratios crop top/bottom or sides.
GuardianProfileImages.introGalleryPreviewCaption: First URL preview (4:3, same object-cover as live).

TravelerPoints.metaDescription: Balance and ledger — spending features coming soon.
TravelerPoints.title: My points
TravelerPoints.lead: Ledger-based credits and debits. Policy-controlled timing and caps apply.
TravelerPoints.needLoginLead: Log in to view your balance and history.
TravelerPoints.cardBalanceHint: Accrual only for now — spending launches in a future release.
TravelerPoints.spendComingBody: Checkout and redemption will ship separately. You can review accruals and history today.
TravelerPoints.historyEmpty: No entries yet. Activity will appear after rewards or adjustments.
TravelerPoints.sheetLead: Recent ledger, reasons, and the active policy summary.
TravelerPoints.sheetFetchError: Could not load points data. Try again.
TravelerPoints.policyUnavailable: No active policy row is available. Accruals still follow server rules.
TravelerPoints.pageHistoryTeaserEmpty: Open the sheet for history and policy. You can also jump to matches or guardians below.
TravelerPoints.pageHistoryTeaserHasRows: We have {count} ledger row(s) on file. Expand each entry in the sheet for reasons and policy versions.

TravelerAccount.metaDescription: Manage your display name, intro, and service profile fields.
TravelerAccount.pageLead: Google data seeds your profile only on first link; values you save here are not overwritten on re-login.
TravelerAccount.needLoginLead: Please sign in to view and edit your account.
TravelerAccount.error: Could not save. Please try again.

HowItWorks.step1_desc: Explore Guardian profiles and sample routes — no login needed.
HowItWorks.step2_desc: Enter your date, budget, language, and interests. Choose a tier.
HowItWorks.step3_desc: Your Guardian creates your route within 24–72 hours. Track progress in real time.
HowItWorks.step4_desc: See your full day on a horizontal timeline. One free revision included.
HowItWorks.step5_desc: Use your route offline on travel day. Check in at each spot.

Pricing.hero_subtitle: One-time route design fee. No subscriptions, no hidden costs.
Pricing.faq_q1: Do I need to speak Korean?
Pricing.faq_a1: Not at all. Your Guardian communicates in your language — Thai, Vietnamese, English, and more.
Pricing.faq_a2: Yes. Full refund if the Guardian doesn't deliver your route on time.
Pricing.faq_a3: Most routes are ready within 24–72 hours after your request is accepted.
Pricing.bottom_cta: Not sure which tier? Start with Standard.
